creator: nokubi@ff.iij4u.or.jp
text:
Pkg-plist in editors/xemacs21-mule contains entry for CANNA support.
I'm appreciate that, but entry is wrong. This causes incorrect
pkg-plist error on japanese/xemacs21-canna.

CANNA specific file is not custom-load.elc, but canna-leim.elc
which has removed on pkg-plist rev 1.21.

How-To-Repeat: make install && make deinstall at /usr/ports/japanese/xemacs21-canna.
